title: Noteblock
description: The “Noteblock” mod is like “Disks & Music Update” in Minecraft. The mod adds new disks to the great world of Minecraft.
body:
![NoteBlock Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d5dfcc26b84ded97fa48380bbda3f5bdf09da19.png)

# 🎵 **Noteblock Mod: A Symphony of Blocks!** 🎵  

Transform your Minecraft experience with the **Noteblock Mod**, a melodic expansion that brings the *ultimate* “Disks & Music Update” to your world!  

## ✨ **What’s New?**  
Dive into a collection of **new, handcrafted music disks**, each featuring songs composed entirely with the iconic **note blocks**. True to its name, the Noteblock Mod celebrates the creativity and charm of Minecraft's musical mechanics, turning simple blocks into full-blown symphonies.  

🎶 Whether you're jamming out in your base or setting the perfect mood for your next adventure, the **Noteblock Mod** delivers an unforgettable auditory experience straight from the heart of Minecraft.  


Support (E-Mail): info@jeamcube.com
Support (Discord): https://discord.gg/qe6cxbfW8s
